title: Contract D - Chatbot Query/Response
description: Data contract for conversational AI chatbot. Owner: Web Team (UI) + ML Team (Backend)

user_query.description: Natural language query from the user
user_query.example: Why is my bill higher this month?

context.description: Contextual data used to generate the response

total_kwh_consumed.description: Total kWh consumed in the period

anomalies_flagged.description: Number of anomalies detected in the period

response.description: AI-generated response to the user query
response.example: Your February bill is higher than usual. Our system flagged 3 usage spikes this month, likely from high-wattage appliances running during peak hours. Reducing air conditioner usage between 6-9PM could lower your next bill significantly.

example.user_query: Why is my bill higher this month?
example.response: Your February bill is higher than usual. Our system flagged 3 usage spikes this month, likely from high-wattage appliances running during peak hours. Reducing air conditioner usage between 6-9PM could lower your next bill significantly.
